name: Mission 1 – First Steps
description: Move the robot through the corridor to the goal (G). Use only Forward and Turn.

name: Mission 2 – The Corridor of Fire
description: Same path, but the walls are now fire! Step only on empty tiles, or you'll burn.

name: Mission 3 – The T‑Path
description: Collect all coins (🪙) before reaching the goal. The goal is locked until you grab them!

name: Mission 4 – Spiral Path
description: Use While and If to automate the explorer through the spiral. The right‑hand rule works here.
